message:
feat(conformance): add 22 SCAN edge-case tests for empty collections and scores

Expand core_scan from 77 to 99 cases:
- SCAN COUNT=100 returns all keys
- SCAN TYPE (case-insensitive uppercase STRING) matches correctly
- HSCAN/SSCAN/ZSCAN on empty collections after member deletion
- HSCAN/SSCAN/ZSCAN wrong arity (missing cursor)
- ZSCAN score correctness: verify (member, score) pairs in output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1985,6 +1985,386 @@
         "kind": "error",
         "value": "ERR syntax error"
       }
+    },

+      "name": "scan_edge_flush",
